Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

LLNL added lshowmount not so long ago, so we need confirmation from them whether it is unused or not.  If it is still in use we should probably add a test case for it to ensure it continues to run. 

While ptlctl is not used by Lustre, I think it is needed if lnet is used independent of Lustre, as Cray does with DVS. Add Patrick to confirm or deny this.

I think lstclient is needed for lnet selftest?  Amir, is that true?  I'm not sure what nidlist is used for. 

I definitely agree debugctl, lrun, obdctl, rmmod_all.sh, and automatic-reconnect-sample can be deleted. 

Mark -1 until this is straightened out.

Patch Set 1:

Andreas - Thanks for checking with us.

I checked, and we package lctl with LNet when we build it for DVS, so there's no need for ptlctl for DVS.

Patch Set 1:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 2:

Isaac or Liang, can you please comment if lstclient is needed or if it is obsolete?  

The lstclient is documented in the lustre/doc/lst.8 man page, so if it is being removed it should also be removed from there. 

Prakash or Chris, could you please comment if lshowmount is still used by LLNL?  If yes then we should probably add a test case for this.

Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

ORNL doesn't use any of these.

Patch Set 3:

I'm hesitant about removing lstclient. It's the only tool to test userspace lnet, while functionality of ptlctl can be found elsewhere.

Although no one uses userspace lnet for now, I'd still tend to keep it for a while.

If you'd insist to remove it, then please make sure to remove references to it in the Lustre OP manual and man(8) lst.

Patch Set 3:

So (now that I know about it) I just used lshowmount for the first time when diagnosing a production issue, and it was actually useful. I vote we keep it around (and make sure it works moving forward).

parents.subject: LU-5332 hsm: Release XATTR lock on exiting

commit.subject: LU-2675 utils: remove unused utilities
commit.message:
LU-2675 utils: remove unused utilities

Remove the unused lnet utilities: debugctl, lstclient, and ptlctl.
Remove the unused lustre utilities: lrun, lshowmount,
module_cleanup.sh, obdctl, and rmmod_all.sh.

Signed-off-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Change-Id: I7797f9b1be267ad36bdcd50848cb0e1e656c3c41
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/10510
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Liang Zhen <liang.zhen@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
